reviews.comment:
Amable y cordial atención. Todo limpio, todo ordenado. Baños impecables. Área de descanso parquizada, con mesas, parrillas y con sombra.

Para mejorar:
No hay pago electrónico en la tienda. Es necesario.

En resumen:
¡Excelente! ¡Felicitaciones!

(Translated by Google)
Friendly and courteous service. Everything was clean and tidy. Spotless bathrooms. A landscaped rest area with tables, grills, and shade.

Rooms for improvement:
There is no electronic payment in the store. It's necessary.

In short:
Excellent! Congratulations!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdS1hY0dREAE
